name: Fruit Cobbler
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together by hand.
2. Heat about 1 quart of fruit, sweetened.
3. Pour half of the batter into a greased 8 x 10 inch baking dish.
4. Add fruit, then pour the remaining batter over the fruit.
5. Bake in an oven at 400 degrees Fahrenheit for 45 minutes or until brown.
